15:37
Marcus Rug Intel
In reply to this message
🕵️ Rug Munch Intelligence — Complete Guide

━━━ 🔍 Token Scanner ━━━

Command: /scan <token_address>

What you get:
• Risk score (0-100): Your safety indicator
• LP lock status: Can devs rug the liquidity?
• Gini coefficient: How concentrated is ownership?
• Creator/dev wallet info: Wallet age & launch history
• KOL detection: Known influencers among top holders 🆕
• Smart money analysis: Top holder reputation scores
• Launch bundles: Were snipers involved?
• Historical trends: Is it getting better or worse?
• 7 rug patterns detected automatically

Example:
/scan DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263

What the numbers mean:
✅ 0-30 risk: SAFE — Low risk, good fundamentals
⚠️ 31-50 risk: LOW RISK — Minor concerns
🚨 51-70 risk: HIGH RISK — Major red flags
⛔ 71-100 risk: EXTREME — DO NOT BUY

Scan Output Sections:
• Risk Score: Overall safety rating (0-100)
• Rug Patterns: Detected scam schemes
• Smart Money: KOL wallets & holder reputation 🆕
• Trading Volume: Buy/sell activity & ratios
• Liquidity: Exit liquidity & LP lock status
• Price Changes: 1h, 6h, 24h trends
• Token Info: Age, holders, top holder %
• Gini: Wealth distribution inequality
• Creator: Dev wallet age & history 🆕
• Charts: Quick links to DexScreener, etc.

Type `/guide scan` for detailed interpretation guide

━━━ ⚖️ Token Comparison ━━━

Command: /compare <token1> <token2> [token3]

What you get:
• Side-by-side risk comparison
• Which token is safest/riskiest
• Liquidity & market cap analysis
• LP lock status comparison
• Automatic recommendation

Example:
/compare DezXA...B263 Eme5T...BAGS

Type `/guide compare` for comparison strategies

━━━ 📊 Understanding Metrics ━━━

Gini Coefficient (0.00-1.00):
• 0.00-0.30: ✅ Healthy distribution
• 0.30-0.50: 🟡 Acceptable concentration
• 0.50-0.70: 🟠 High concentration
• 0.70-1.00: 🔴 Extreme whale dominance

LP Lock Status:
• 🔥 Burned: Safest (permanent)
• 🔒 Locked: Safe until unlock date
• ⚠️ Unlocked: Can be removed anytime (RUG RISK!)

Buy/Sell Ratio:
• >0.7: Healthy buying pressure
• 0.5-0.7: Balanced
• <0.5: Heavy selling pressure

LP/MC Ratio:
• >10%: Very healthy liquidity
• 5-10%: Adequate liquidity
• <5%: Thin liquidity (exit risk)

Creator Wallet Age:
• 🟢 30+ days: Established wallet (lower risk)
• 🟡 7-30 days: New wallet (caution)
• 🔴 <7 days: Brand new wallet (HIGH RISK!)

Note: Very new creator wallets suggest potential rug risk. Established wallets with launch history show credibility.
15:37
In reply to this message
━━━ 👤 Wallet Position Checker ━━━

Command: /checkwallet <wallet> <token> [days]

What you get:
• Current holdings & value
• Entry price & unrealized PnL
• Trading history (buys/sells)
• Holding pattern (💎 diamond hands vs 🔴 dumper)
• Wallet risk comparison

Examples:
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 (all time)
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 30 (last 30 days)

Type `/guide wallet` for position analysis guide

━━━ ⚖️ Wallet Comparison ━━━

Command: /comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> [days]

What you get:
• Portfolio comparison (value, diversity)
• Trading patterns (💎 diamond hands vs paper hands)
• Performance (total PnL, win rate)
• Best/worst trades
• Risk profile comparison

Examples:
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz (all time)
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz 30 (30 days)

Type `/guide walletcompare` for comparison guide

━━━ 🏆 Wallet Reputation ━━━

Command: /reputation <wallet> [days]

What you get:
• Reputation score (0-100): Overall trading skill
• Classification (🧠 Smart Money, 🎲 Degen, etc.)
• Win rate across all trades
• Average ROI & total PnL
• Top gainers & worst losers

Examples:
/reputation DYw8j...NSKK (all time)
/reputation 0x742d...bEb0 90 (last 90 days)

Reputation Tiers:
✅ 80-100: Elite trader (Smart Money)
🟢 60-79: Good trader (Solid/Diamond Hands)
🟡 40-59: Average trader (Learning)
🔴 0-39: Poor trader (Degen)

Supports Solana, Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche
15:37
In reply to this message
━━━ 📊 Portfolio Tracking ━━━

View portfolio: /portfolio
Add position: /addposition <token_address>
Remove position: /removeposition <token_address>

What you get:
• Real-time portfolio value tracking
• Individual token PnL (Profit & Loss)
• Best & worst performers
• AI-generated portfolio visual card 🆕
• Multi-chain support

Example:
/addposition DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263
/portfolio → See holdings + auto-generates visual card

Benefits:
✅ Track multiple positions in one place
✅ Real-time profit/loss calculations
✅ AI-generated shareable portfolio card
✅ Multi-chain portfolio aggregation

━━━ 🔔 Real-Time Alerts ━━━

Create alert: /createalert
View alerts: /listalerts
Delete alert: /deletealert <id>

Alert Types:
🔴 Price Drop — Get notified when price drops >X%
🟢 Price Pump — Get notified when price pumps >X%
💧 Liquidity Drop — LP removed or unlocked
🐋 Whale Movement — Large holder buying/selling
⚠️ Risk Change — Risk score increases
👥 Holder Change — Significant holder distribution change

Example:
/createalert → Follow interactive setup
• Select alert type (e.g., "Price Drop")
• Set threshold (e.g., 15% drop)
• Choose tokens (portfolio, specific, or high-risk)

Benefits:
✅ Never miss critical price movements
✅ Automated 24/7 monitoring
✅ Customizable thresholds per token
✅ Instant Telegram notifications
✅ Snooze/dismiss functionality

━━━ 🐋 Whale Alerts ━━━

Start tracking: /watch <token_address> [note]
View watchlist: /watchlist
Stop tracking: /unwatch <number>
Add note: /tag <number> <your_note>

What you get alerted about:
🔴 Massive sells (>10% of holdings - mega whale)
🟠 Whale sells (2-10%)
🟡 New whale enters top 10
🔴 Whale exits top 10
🟢 Accumulation (>5% increase)

Alert frequency:
• 🔥 HIGH (1 min) — Active trading, volatile tokens
• ⚡ MEDIUM (5 min) — Default monitoring
• 🐢 LOW (15 min) — Long-term holds

Type `/guide whale` for whale alert setup guide

━━━ 💡 Quick Info Keywords ━━━

Type these in chat for instant info:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━

1. Always scan before buying — Even if you trust the source
2. Add to portfolio — Track all your positions with /addposition
3. Set price alerts — Never miss critical price movements
4. Scan multiple times — Build trend data over days
5. Check LP lock status — >80% secured is minimum
6. Watch Gini coefficient — >0.70 is whale-dominated
7. Compare similar tokens — Find the safest option
8. Use whale alerts — Know when big holders are moving
15:37
In reply to this message
━━━ 📚 Educational Content ━━━

Learn to spot rugs: /lesson
Take a quiz: /quiz [lesson_id]
Browse lessons: /lessons [filter]
Track progress: /myprogress

What you'll learn:
🍯 Honeypot detection
💸 Dev token dumps
💧 Fake liquidity tricks
📦 Bundle manipulation
📊 Fake volume signals
📈 Pump and dump patterns
🎭 Token impersonation

Earn reputation:
🏆 +2 reputation for perfect quiz scores!

━━━ 🏆 Win Cards ━━━

Generate win card: /wincard <token_address>
View your cards: /wincards

What are win cards?
Celebrate when you call a rug early! If you scanned a token with high risk (≥70) and it dumped >20%, generate a shareable win card with:
• Your original scan date and risk score
• How much the token dumped
• Social sharing buttons (Twitter, Telegram)

Requirements:
✅ Must have scanned token before it dumped
✅ Token must have dumped ≥20%
✅ Your scan risk score must be ≥70

Example:
/wincard DezXA...B263 → Generate win card if eligible

━━━ 🚩 Community Moderation ━━━

Flag suspicious token: /flag <token_address> <reason>
Vote on flags: /vote <flag_id>
View pending flags: /flags
Appeal a flag: /voteappeal <flag_id>

How it works:
• Flag tokens you believe are scams/rugs
• Community votes: Agree, Disagree, Need More Info
• 10 agrees = token gets blacklisted
• Blacklisted tokens show warning on all scans

Reputation-based voting:
• Higher reputation = more vote weight
• Prevents spam/manipulation
• Build trust through accurate calls

Example:
/flag DYw8j...NSKK Confirmed honeypot - cannot sell

━━━ 📖 Detailed Guides ━━━

/guide scan — How to interpret scan results
/guide compare — Token comparison strategies
/guide wallet — Wallet position analysis
/guide walletcompare — Wallet comparison guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup and management
/guide portfolio — Portfolio tracking and management
/guide alerts — Setting up real-time alerts

━━━ 🆘 Need Help? ━━━

• Commands not working? Check your spelling
• Token not found? Verify the address is correct
• Want to suggest features? DM @CryptoRugMunch

Built with 🕵️ by Rug Munch Intelligence
15:37
In reply to this message
━━━ 🐦 X/Twitter Integration ━━━

Link your X account: /linkx @yourhandle
Check link status: /linkx
Unlink: /unlinkx

How it works:
1️⃣ Run /linkx @yourhandle here in Telegram
2️⃣ Follow @MarcusRugIntel on X
3️⃣ Auto-verified — you're linked!

Once linked, mention @MarcusRugIntel on X with a contract address:
• 🐋 Whale tier: Full scan result posted on X
• 💎 Holder tier: Teaser + redirect to Telegram
• 🆓 Free: Link prompt

Example X post:
@MarcusRugIntel scan CXCWuX...pump

Marcus replies directly on X with analysis! 🗿

Crypto Rug Muncher
Pleased to announce that both of our apps, Rug Munch Intelligence and @MarcusRugIntel, are now available to test in our Telegram chat.

Here's how it works:

• Rug Munch Intelligence: Everyone gets limited free contract and wallet address scans
• Marcus: The number of scans you can perform depends on how much $CRM you hold
• All scan results from the community are visible to everyone in the chat for free

Join our Telegram chat using the link below to start testing. We're excited to get your feedback as we continue developing these tools before releasing them to the wider community.

Crypto Rug Muncher
Big update to the $CRM / $cryptorugmunch project! I am very pleased to announce that our AI agent @MarcusRugIntel will soon be live as a web extension app. Our bot will no longer be constrained to just X and Telegram. You will soon be able to use him across the web on sites like GMGN, Dexscreener, and many others.

This is yet another plan in our project roadmap being fulfilled early. Get $CRM / $cryptorugmunch and join us as we build out the Bloomberg Terminal of Shitcoins the space desperately needs!

23:08
Amaro De Abreu
So just something to note. Here is an update on my psychology approach to this gaining users problem:

I am looking at ways to reduce friction and become de-facto used, by any and all.

I - Psychology: One Behavior Change

Our one ask: "Glance at the number before you buy."

The biggest move: auto-inject risk badges directly into DexScreener/Pump.fun pages. No click needed. Content scripts already extract CAs from all 8 sites — we just need ~50 lines per script to inject a DOM overlay. The extension BECOMES part of DexScreener. Zero behavior changes.

Kill all onboarding gates. No wallet connect, no registration, no tier selection before first scan. That comes AFTER the "whoa" moment.

II - Product: Learn the User

"You Dodged This" alerts: THE viral mechanism we're sleeping on. Autopsy monitor already detects rugs. scan_log already knows who scanned what. Wire them together: when a token someone scanned rugs → send them "You scanned $RUGCOIN at risk 87 five days ago. It rugged -94% today." + personalized win card + share button.

Personal Risk Profile: "73% of your scans are Pump.fun memecoins under 24h old. That's the highest-risk category." The "personal dictionary" equivalent.

Adaptive output: First scan = simple verdict. 20th scan = full forensics. Product grows with the user.

III - Team: The Pod Advantage

The 2-person pod lesson IS us. One developer + AI partners = full context, full accountability, zero overhead. We already out-ship teams of 20 because there are no handoffs. The "taste" principle is already our standard, sub-5s scans, "perfect or not at all" (why I disabled buy bot), Marcus's voice and tone indistinguishable from human.

The Flywheel
See badge → Skip rug → Get "you dodged this" alert → Screenshot & share → Friend installs → Repeat
Every "you dodged this" moment is a potential viral event. Every shared win card is free marketing with social proof. The referral prompt comes at PEAK motivation (just saved money), not cold onboarding.

The North Star Test

"If we turned off CRM tools tomorrow, would users FEEL it?"

Today: probably not. Target: they'd feel naked looking at a token page without a risk badge. Like browsing without an ad blocker, you can, but why would you?

Make the absence feel worse than the presence feels good.
Amaro De Abreu pinned this message
14 February 2026

Marcus Rug Intel
In reply to this message
🕵️ Rug Munch Intelligence — Complete Guide

━━━ 🔍 Token Scanner ━━━

Command: /scan <token_address>

What you get:
• Risk score (0-100): Your safety indicator
• LP lock status: Can devs rug the liquidity?
• Gini coefficient: How concentrated is ownership?
• Creator/dev wallet info: Wallet age & launch history
• KOL detection: Known influencers among top holders 🆕
• Smart money analysis: Top holder reputation scores
• Launch bundles: Were snipers involved?
• Historical trends: Is it getting better or worse?
• 7 rug patterns detected automatically

━━━ 👥 First Buyer Analysis ━━━

Command: /firstbuyers <token_address> (or /fb)

What you get:
• Visual grid: 💎 holders 💀 dumpers 🔗 bundled
• Supply acquired by first 50 buyers
• Current holdings vs initial
• Median holding time
• Realized profit (SOL + USD)
• Bundle detection (same-block buys)
• Risk score with specific flags

Detects insider dumping, coordinated buys, and scam patterns

Example:
/scan DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263

What the numbers mean:
✅ 0-30 risk: SAFE — Low risk, good fundamentals
⚠️ 31-50 risk: LOW RISK — Minor concerns
🚨 51-70 risk: HIGH RISK — Major red flags
⛔ 71-100 risk: EXTREME — DO NOT BUY

Scan Output Sections:
• Risk Score: Overall safety rating (0-100)
• Rug Patterns: Detected scam schemes
• Smart Money: KOL wallets & holder reputation 🆕
• Trading Volume: Buy/sell activity & ratios
• Liquidity: Exit liquidity & LP lock status
• Price Changes: 1h, 6h, 24h trends
• Token Info: Age, holders, top holder %
• Gini: Wealth distribution inequality
• Creator: Dev wallet age & history 🆕
• Charts: Quick links to DexScreener, etc.

Type `/guide scan` for detailed interpretation guide

━━━ ⚖️ Token Comparison ━━━

Command: /compare <token1> <token2> [token3]

What you get:
• Side-by-side risk comparison
• Which token is safest/riskiest
• Liquidity & market cap analysis
• LP lock status comparison
• Automatic recommendation

Example:
/compare DezXA...B263 Eme5T...BAGS

Type `/guide compare` for comparison strategies

━━━ 📊 Understanding Metrics ━━━

Gini Coefficient (0.00-1.00):
• 0.00-0.30: ✅ Healthy distribution
• 0.30-0.50: 🟡 Acceptable concentration
• 0.50-0.70: 🟠 High concentration
• 0.70-1.00: 🔴 Extreme whale dominance

LP Lock Status:
• 🔥 Burned: Safest (permanent)
• 🔒 Locked: Safe until unlock date
• ⚠️ Unlocked: Can be removed anytime (RUG RISK!)

Buy/Sell Ratio:
• >0.7: Healthy buying pressure
• 0.5-0.7: Balanced
• <0.5: Heavy selling pressure

LP/MC Ratio:
• >10%: Very healthy liquidity
• 5-10%: Adequate liquidity
• <5%: Thin liquidity (exit risk)

Creator Wallet Age:
• 🟢 30+ days: Established wallet (lower risk)
• 🟡 7-30 days: New wallet (caution)
• 🔴 <7 days: Brand new wallet (HIGH RISK!)

Note: Very new creator wallets suggest potential rug risk. Established wallets with launch history show credibility.
01:51
In reply to this message
━━━ 👤 Wallet Position Checker ━━━

Command: /checkwallet <wallet> <token> [days]

What you get:
• Current holdings & value
• Entry price & unrealized PnL
• Trading history (buys/sells)
• Holding pattern (💎 diamond hands vs 🔴 dumper)
• Wallet risk comparison

Examples:
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 (all time)
/checkwallet 7xKXt...abc DezXA...B263 30 (last 30 days)

Type `/guide wallet` for position analysis guide

━━━ ⚖️ Wallet Comparison ━━━

Command: /comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> [days]

What you get:
• Portfolio comparison (value, diversity)
• Trading patterns (💎 diamond hands vs paper hands)
• Performance (total PnL, win rate)
• Best/worst trades
• Risk profile comparison

Examples:
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz (all time)
/comparewallets 7xKXt...abc 9yZPq...xyz 30 (30 days)

Type `/guide walletcompare` for comparison guide

━━━ 🏆 Wallet Reputation ━━━

Command: /reputation <wallet> [days]

What you get:
• Reputation score (0-100): Overall trading skill
• Classification (🧠 Smart Money, 🎲 Degen, etc.)
• Win rate across all trades
• Average ROI & total PnL
• Top gainers & worst losers

Examples:
/reputation DYw8j...NSKK (all time)
/reputation 0x742d...bEb0 90 (last 90 days)

Reputation Tiers:
✅ 80-100: Elite trader (Smart Money)
🟢 60-79: Good trader (Solid/Diamond Hands)
🟡 40-59: Average trader (Learning)
🔴 0-39: Poor trader (Degen)

Supports Solana, Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche
01:51
In reply to this message
━━━ 📊 Portfolio Tracking ━━━

View portfolio: /portfolio
Add position: /addposition <token_address>
Remove position: /removeposition <token_address>

What you get:
• Real-time portfolio value tracking
• Individual token PnL (Profit & Loss)
• Best & worst performers
• AI-generated portfolio visual card 🆕
• Multi-chain support

Example:
/addposition DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263
/portfolio → See holdings + auto-generates visual card

Benefits:
✅ Track multiple positions in one place
✅ Real-time profit/loss calculations
✅ AI-generated shareable portfolio card
✅ Multi-chain portfolio aggregation

━━━ 🔔 Real-Time Alerts ━━━

Create alert: /createalert
View alerts: /listalerts
Delete alert: /deletealert <id>

Alert Types:
🔴 Price Drop — Get notified when price drops >X%
🟢 Price Pump — Get notified when price pumps >X%
💧 Liquidity Drop — LP removed or unlocked
🐋 Whale Movement — Large holder buying/selling
⚠️ Risk Change — Risk score increases
👥 Holder Change — Significant holder distribution change

Example:
/createalert → Follow interactive setup
• Select alert type (e.g., "Price Drop")
• Set threshold (e.g., 15% drop)
• Choose tokens (portfolio, specific, or high-risk)

Benefits:
✅ Never miss critical price movements
✅ Automated 24/7 monitoring
✅ Customizable thresholds per token
✅ Instant Telegram notifications
✅ Snooze/dismiss functionality

━━━ 🐋 Whale Alerts ━━━

Start tracking: /watch <token_address> [note]
View watchlist: /watchlist
Stop tracking: /unwatch <number>
Add note: /tag <number> <your_note>

What you get alerted about:
🔴 Massive sells (>10% of holdings - mega whale)
🟠 Whale sells (2-10%)
🟡 New whale enters top 10
🔴 Whale exits top 10
🟢 Accumulation (>5% increase)

Alert frequency:
• 🔥 HIGH (1 min) — Active trading, volatile tokens
• ⚡ MEDIUM (5 min) — Default monitoring
• 🐢 LOW (15 min) — Long-term holds

Type `/guide whale` for whale alert setup guide

━━━ 💡 Quick Info Keywords ━━━

Type these in chat for instant info:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━

1. Always scan before buying — Even if you trust the source
2. Add to portfolio — Track all your positions with /addposition
3. Set price alerts — Never miss critical price movements
4. Scan multiple times — Build trend data over days
5. Check LP lock status — >80% secured is minimum
6. Watch Gini coefficient — >0.70 is whale-dominated
7. Compare similar tokens — Find the safest option
8. Use whale alerts — Know when big holders are moving
01:51
In reply to this message
━━━ 📚 Educational Content ━━━

Learn to spot rugs: /lesson
Take a quiz: /quiz [lesson_id]
Browse lessons: /lessons [filter]
Track progress: /myprogress

What you'll learn:
🍯 Honeypot detection
💸 Dev token dumps
💧 Fake liquidity tricks
📦 Bundle manipulation
📊 Fake volume signals
📈 Pump and dump patterns
🎭 Token impersonation

Earn reputation:
🏆 +2 reputation for perfect quiz scores!

━━━ 🏆 Win Cards ━━━

Generate win card: /wincard <token_address>
View your cards: /wincards

What are win cards?
Celebrate when you call a rug early! If you scanned a token with high risk (≥70) and it dumped >20%, generate a shareable win card with:
• Your original scan date and risk score
• How much the token dumped
• Social sharing buttons (Twitter, Telegram)

Requirements:
✅ Must have scanned token before it dumped
✅ Token must have dumped ≥20%
✅ Your scan risk score must be ≥70

Example:
/wincard DezXA...B263 → Generate win card if eligible

━━━ 🚩 Community Moderation ━━━

Flag suspicious token: /flag <token_address> <reason>
Vote on flags: /vote <flag_id>
View pending flags: /flags
Appeal a flag: /voteappeal <flag_id>

How it works:
• Flag tokens you believe are scams/rugs
• Community votes: Agree, Disagree, Need More Info
• 10 agrees = token gets blacklisted
• Blacklisted tokens show warning on all scans

Reputation-based voting:
• Higher reputation = more vote weight
• Prevents spam/manipulation
• Build trust through accurate calls

Example:
/flag DYw8j...NSKK Confirmed honeypot - cannot sell

━━━ 📖 Detailed Guides ━━━

/guide scan — How to interpret scan results
/guide compare — Token comparison strategies
/guide wallet — Wallet position analysis
/guide walletcompare — Wallet comparison guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup and management
/guide portfolio — Portfolio tracking and management
/guide alerts — Setting up real-time alerts

━━━ 🆘 Need Help? ━━━

• Commands not working? Check your spelling
• Token not found? Verify the address is correct
• Want to suggest features? DM @CryptoRugMunch

━━━ 🔬 Analysis Tools ━━━

After every scan, tap the buttons below the result!

🫧 Bubble Map — /bubblemap <token_address> [10|20|50]
Visual network of top holders. See who holds what,
spot clusters and suspicious connections.

👥 First Buyers — /firstbuyers <token_address> (or /fb)
Analyze the first 50 buyers. Spot insiders, snipers,
bundled wallets, and diamond hands vs dumpers.

🔱 KOL Network — /kolnetwork
Network convergence map showing which KOLs share
positions and how connected they are.

🔱 KOL Portfolio — /kolmap <kol_name>
Visual bubble map of a specific KOL's portfolio.
See every position sized by SOL invested.

👥 Deep Holders — /holders <token_address>
In-depth holder analysis with sniper detection,
bundle analysis, and concentration metrics.

📊 Compare Score — Button after scan
Grade your token A-F vs thousands of others.
See percentile ranking and 30-day survival odds.

🔔 Quick Alerts — Button after scan
One-tap alert setup for price drops or risk changes.

🎨 Share Card — Button after scan
Generate a visual scan card to share.

━━━ 🐦 X/Twitter Integration ━━━

Link your X account: /linkx @yourhandle
Check link status: /linkx
Unlink: /unlinkx

How it works:
1️⃣ Run /linkx @yourhandle here in Telegram
2️⃣ Follow @MarcusRugIntel on X
3️⃣ Auto-verified — you're linked!

Once linked, mention @MarcusRugIntel on X with a contract address:
• 🐋 Whale tier: Full scan result posted on X
• 💎 Holder tier: Teaser + redirect to Telegram
• 🆓 Free: Link prompt

Example X post:
@MarcusRugIntel scan CXCWuX...pump

Marcus replies directly on X with analysis! 🗿

━━━ API Key Management ━━━

Manage API keys for all 7 supported chains directly in Telegram:

/apikeys — View all API key configuration status
/setkey <chain> <key> — Set API key for a chain
/testkey <chain> — Test if API key works
/getkeys — Get links to register for API keys

Example:
/setkey arbitrum ABC123XYZ789...
/testkey arbitrum


Supported chains:
⚡ Solana (helius)
Ξ Ethereum (ethereum)
🔷 Base (base)
🔵 Arbitrum (arbitrum)
🟣 Polygon (polygon)
🔴 Optimism (optimism)
🔺 Avalanche (avalanche)

━━━ Bot Management ━━━

/stats (or /analytics) — View analytics dashboard
/announce <text> — Send immediate broadcast to all users
/schedule — Schedule broadcast for future delivery
/broadcasts — View all past/scheduled broadcasts
/config — View current bot settings

Broadcast features:
• Send announcements to all active users
• Schedule broadcasts for specific dates/times
• Rate-limited delivery (30 msg/sec)
• Delivery stats (sent, failed, blocked)
• Support for markdown formatting

Crypto Rug Muncher
💜 Happy Valentine’s Day to the $CRM – $cryptorugmunch Community! 💜

Even in the toughest market conditions, our mission hasn’t changed — we keep our promises. The first six weeks of 2026 have been all about building during the bear, and the results are already beginning to show.

We’re thrilled to announce the beta release of both our Contract & Wallet Analysis Tool and our AI Agent on Telegram, both ahead of schedule. These tools will soon be available as browser extensions and mobile apps, rolling out much faster than originally planned.

But this is only the beginning. We’re committed to continually improving our platforms until they become the most trusted security and analysis tools in crypto.

We’ll also continue working diligently to fully integrate our community tokens — $CRM and  $cryptorugmunch  — into our app ecosystem, making them an integral part of what we’ve built and everything still to come.

To our incredible community: thank you for believing in the team, supporting us through every dip, and helping us grow. We truly feel the love this Valentine’s Day — and we wouldn’t be here without you. ❤️💪

Crypto Rug Muncher
You can always tell it’s a bear market when the timeline pivots from blatant scamming to larping as philosophers and geopolitical experts.

It’s the Grifter Pivot: A couple of mid-curve scammers like Bark and Books—with about two active brain cells between them—suddenly start cosplaying as macro-economists and "thinkers." They’re acting as if the entire space has amnesia, hoping we’ve forgotten they’re the same fucking morons who relentlessly rugged retail with dog shit and brain-dead meme scams.

Don't be fooled. This is strategy and they’re just biding their time, drowning the zone in AI-generated slop and pseudo-intellectual drivel to bury their past misdeeds until the candles turn green again.

We see you. We remember. And we’ll be right here to call out your next scam the second you think the world has finally forgotten.

10:22
Crypto Rug Muncher
The Binance and BNB mafia are so desperate for a PR win they’d probably try to pay off the Pope to stop the public perception bleed they’ve experienced since 10/10 if they thought it might help them. Who remembers a few months back when they tried to buy legitimacy by "enlisting" ZachXBT to sleuth on their own chain?

They weren't looking for transparency with this move; they were looking for a narrative shift to bury the $19B wipeout and potentially a patsy to provide reputational legitimacy to their operation. If they wanted to kill the "FUD," they’d stop the gimmicks, open the books, and prove their innocence.

Instead, despite bringing on Zach, we are left with no explanation for the following holes in the story they are trying to sell us:

The 8-Day Window: Binance announced an oracle fix on Oct 6 but didn’t schedule it until Oct 14. The crash hit right in that gap. Was the "internal error" a systemic failure they knew was coming, or just a convenient excuse for why USDe hit $0.65 only on Binance?

The $19B vs. $328M Math: They’re patting themselves on the back for a $328M payout while $19,000,000,000 in retail value evaporated due to "phantom prices" that didn't exist anywhere else in the market.

The Umbilical Cord: We need a full audit of the BNB Chain float. No more hiding behind "associated entities." We want the names of the orgs owning the supply and proof of how this ownership has been historically obscured to prop up the "decentralized" facade as well as to manipulate the price of the BNB token through undisclosed centralization.

Until they provide a raw look at the power concentration behind the chain and its connection to the Binance exchange, it’s all smoke and mirrors. They aren't "dancing" around the truth—they're trying to bury it any way they can.

We don’t need more marketing gimmicks from this team; we need a real audit of all Binance-affiliated projects from a third party that isn't already on their payroll and paid off and compromised as a result. Any other move is just lip service and an attempt at distracting the community from the very serious questions that still remain and continue to go unanswered to this day.

Secure your crypto, get your popcorn, and enjoy the chaos and pure comedy gold to come as the space goes through its quadrennial cleansing cycle.

What’s notable is how some major scanners and aggregators are still catching up to newer on-chain designs.

The market benefits from reliable tooling. Without it, risk signals become noisy and users are left guessing.

We’ve shared the relevant data multiple times. Progress is happening, but there is still room for improvement across parts of the stack.

Your scanner is one of the few that correctly interprets PDA-owned CLMM structures.

The space does not need more noise.
It needs better tooling adoption.

16:02
Crypto Rug Muncher
CZ reportedly owns nearly 90% of Binance, while his partner, co-founder, and the mother of his children, Yi He, controls the remaining 10%. Despite this 100% internal lock, they expect the industry and their customers to believe that their installed puppet, Richard Teng—who reportedly owns 0% equity—is "co-CEO" and equally calling the shots on a daily basis.

It’s a tale so ludicrous it almost defies belief, yet Binance has doubled down on this narrative since 2023, following CZ’s conviction for money laundering and his "permanent ban" from leadership in the company. The facade was almost plausible while CZ was behind bars, but it’s laughable now—especially after his suspicious pardon from Trump in late 2025.

If CZ truly has no hand in the company, why was he personally shilling memes the exchange listed last year, appearing as the keynote speaker at Binance-hosted events, and now making it his personal mission to hunt down every two-bit crypto account that dares to "FUD" the intentionally opaque and shadowy exchange he repeatedly claims he doesn’t control?

It’s even more glaring when you look at the books. CZ received his pardon and now suddenly Binance holds nearly 90% of the total supply of USD1—the stablecoin issued by Trump’s family project, World Liberty Financial. It’s a hell of a lot of effort and financial coordination for a guy who claims he's "totally uninvolved" and feels the need to constantly remind us of it, all while micromanaging the narrative and capital to the point that the truth has become pathetically obvious.

I don't buy it, and neither do many observers of the industry, but it's the line Binance constantly takes and the story they hope we all eventually believe too no matter how implausible it seems.

D
21:29
DevsNightmarePro by @REKTsol_bot
Emoji Analysis Help

Here's what the emojis in the grid mean:

🍃 - Fresh Wallet
🏹 - Sniper
☠️ - NGMI (Not Gonna Make It): Low overall performance.
💎 - Based Trader: Good overall performance.
🦍 - Degen Extraordinaire: Excellent overall performance.
🔱 - Crypto God: Outstanding overall performance.
❓ - Unknown: Not enough data to determine the wallet's performance.

The analysis is based on several factors:
1. Profit: Calculated from buy and sell transactions.
2. Hold Time: How long the wallet holds tokens before selling.
3. Win Rate: Percentage of profitable trades.

The report includes the following metrics:
- Percentage of supply initially acquired by first buyers.
- Percentage of supply currently held by first buyers.
- Median holding time for all first buyers.
- Total realized profit: The sum of profits across all first buyers.
- Profitable wallet ratio: Percentage of first buyer wallets that are profitable.

These metrics help assess:
1. The token's initial distribution and current holding patterns.
2. The behavior and success rate of early investors.
3. The overall trading performance of the first buyers across all their activities.

Remember, this analysis is based on on-chain data and should be used alongside other research methods for a comprehensive understanding of a token's potential. The overall profit and profitability ratio provide insights into the general trading success of the first buyers, which may indicate their level of experience or sophistication in trading.
❤

20:40
Crypto Rug Muncher
Also folks quick update from me I'm around but have come down w community acquired pneumonia at the moment which I've caught in Cambodia of all places while awaiting a visa to return to Thailand where I'm based. I believe I've got a handle on it early but am essentially wiped from a walk to the store at the moment. Plenty of rug alerts / scam coverage coming from my end once I feel a little better as well as some on the ground coverage on the scam scene here in Cambodia and how crypto is used to facilitate it all. The content is only going to improve in its depth and detail here regardless of how the market moves. Please just give me another day or so to catch my wind and I'll be back to full strength with a month or two ahead of me and in the center of the scamming world to really dig into it all.
❤

23:59
Crypto Rug Muncher
Just a reminder to watch out for the Clickout Media / Finixio ghouls. For years these folks have been buying up mainstream-adjacent media sites and turning them into hubs to pump their own presale scams and shady offshore casinos. As an example, they’ve got 99Bitcoins, Techopedia, and Cryptonews dot com in their portfolio just to name a few.

The setup is always the same: bait retail into some worthless shitcoin presale they entirely control but pretend they don't, then inevitably pull the rug and claim the "project failed." After the scam is played out they just spin up a new group of tokens and repeat the cycle on a fresh batch of naive investors. Presales are basically dead anyway. If you see one being pushed hard on a crypto "news" site, just assume it’s a bought and paid for scam and stay away.
❤ 1
